import torch
print('torch imported')
from torch_geometric.nn import SchNet
print('SchNet imported')
model = SchNet()
print('model created')
# test a small forward pass on CPU
z = torch.tensor([6, 1, 1], dtype=torch.long)
pos = torch.randn(3, 3)
batch = torch.tensor([0, 0, 0])
out = model(z, pos, batch)
print('forward pass done, shape:', out.shape)
# try loading data
print('loading 3D data...')
import os
data_path = '/data/train_3d.pt'
if os.path.exists(data_path):
    data = torch.load(data_path, map_location='cpu')
    print(f'loaded {len(data)} molecules')
    print('sample keys:', data[0].keys())
else:
    print('data file not found')
print('diagnostic complete')
